name: Abir Deb
tagline: Java Developer · CSE Student · Backend Enthusiast
whoIAm: a passionate backend developer currently pursuing Computer Science & Engineering at Khwaja Yunus Ali University (Batch 18). I focus on clean OOP architecture, robust backend systems with Spring Boot, and deep exploration of Data Structures & Algorithms.
whatIDo: Beyond backend development, I explore full-stack applications with React & Spring Boot, problem solving with DSA, and modern web experiences. I love building systems that are both technically solid and visually clean.

education.description: Pursuing B.Sc in Computer Science & Engineering at Khwaja Yunus Ali University.
Completed Higher Secondary Certificate in Science Group.
Completed Secondary School Certificate with focus on Science.
